summary_en: 1,686,700 shares acquired (11.04% S/O) for ¥357,996,800 over the period June 16, 2025–May 14, 2026 via open-market purchase on TSE. Authorization limit: 1,700,000 shares (11.18% S/O), ¥358M ceiling. Program completed.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition Status and Completion of Acquisition of Treasury Stock (acquisition under Company Code Article 165(2) bylaw provision)
translation_en_brief: HOPE, Inc. (TSE Growth / Fukuoka Exchange Q-Board, code 6195) reported the completion of its treasury stock acquisition program authorized by the board on June 13, 2025. The company acquired 1,686,700 shares (11.04% of shares outstanding) for a total of ¥357,996,800 via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange during the period June 16, 2025 through May 14, 2026. The original authorization approved acquisition of up to 1,700,000 shares (11.18% S/O) with a ¥358 million ceiling over the 12-month window ending June 15, 2026. As of May 14, 2026, the program has been fully executed, consuming 99.22% of the authorized share volume and 99.91% of the authorized yen amount. The acquisition was conducted in accordance with Company Code Article 156, as applied via Article 165(3).
